metadata.description: Maps each deduplicated threat to its discovering Phase B specialists for confidence analysis

TECH-H001.title: Registry onlyVaultMaintainer Modifier Uses Wrong Boolean Logic, Bricking Vault Administration
TECH-H001.duplicate_group_description: Registry onlyVaultMaintainer/onlyVaultMaintainerWithoutTimeLock/onlyVaultGoverner modifiers use OR (||) instead of AND (&&) in revert condition, requiring callers to hold BOTH the vault role AND EMERGENCY_ROLE simultaneously, bricking vault administration

TECH-H002.title: Holding Position Index Corruption via Swap-and-Pop Key Mismatch Between msg.sender and calculatorConnector
TECH-H002.duplicate_group_description: Holding position swap-and-pop in Registry.updateHoldingPosition uses calculatorConnector for key reconstruction instead of the original msg.sender, corrupting isPositionUsed mapping for token positions

TECH-H003.title: TVL Calculation Underflow DoS in Multiple Connectors Freezes Entire Vault
TECH-H003.duplicate_group_description: TVL calculation underflow in multiple lending connectors (Silo, Prisma, Compound, Dolomite, Aave) when debt exceeds collateral causes vault-wide DoS via Solidity 0.8.x revert

ECON-H001.title: UNIv3 TVL Overcounting via Aggregate Pool Position Query Enables Share Price Inflation
ECON-H001.duplicate_group_description: UNIv3Connector._getPositionTVL queries pool.positions() using aggregate key (positionManager, tickLower, tickUpper) instead of per-NFT liquidity, overcounting TVL from all users at same tick range

TECH-H005.title: SwapAndBridgeHandler onlyExistingRoute Modifier Allows Disabled Routes to Execute
TECH-H005.duplicate_group_description: SwapAndBridgeHandler onlyExistingRoute modifier uses AND (&&) instead of OR (||), allowing disabled routes with non-zero addresses to remain executable, defeating the emergency disable mechanism

TECH-H006.title: DolomiteConnector.openBorrowPosition Passes removePosition=true Instead of false, Losing Position Tracking
TECH-H006.duplicate_group_description: DolomiteConnector.openBorrowPosition passes removePosition=true instead of false to registry.updateHoldingPosition, causing borrow positions to be untracked and debt excluded from TVL

ECON-H004.title: SiloConnector TVL Miscalculation via Hardcoded 18-Decimal Price Normalization
ECON-H004.duplicate_group_description: SiloConnector._getPositionTVL hardcodes 1e18 normalization regardless of token decimals, producing wildly incorrect TVL for non-18-decimal tokens like USDC/USDT

TECH-H008.title: SNXv3Connector TVL Double-Counts Collateral by Adding totalDeposited and totalAssigned
TECH-H008.duplicate_group_description: SNXv3Connector._getPositionTVL double-counts collateral by adding totalDeposited + totalAssigned, where totalAssigned is already a subset of totalDeposited

TECH-H009.title: Watchers.verifyRemoveLiquidity Empty Implementation Provides Zero Withdrawal Verification
TECH-H009.duplicate_group_description: Watchers.verifyRemoveLiquidity has empty function body, providing zero withdrawal validation when accounting manager extracts tokens from connectors

ECON-H010.title: Cross-Chain TVL Update Lacks Timestamp Monotonicity Check Enabling Stale Data Injection
ECON-H010.duplicate_group_description: OmnichainManagerBaseChain.updateTVL lacks monotonic timestamp check, allowing stale cross-chain TVL to overwrite fresher data when LayerZero delivers messages out of order

ECON-H002.title: Cross-Vault Privilege Escalation via Global FlashLoan Address Bypassing Per-Vault Access Control
ECON-H002.duplicate_group_description: Global registry.flashLoan() address grants onlyManager access to ALL vaults' connectors, enabling cross-vault privilege escalation by any single vault's keeper

OPS-H011.title: BalancerFlashLoan Allows Arbitrary External Calls via Unvalidated destinationConnector Array
OPS-H011.duplicate_group_description: BalancerFlashLoan.receiveFlashLoan executes arbitrary calls to unvalidated destinationConnector addresses, allowing keeper to call any contract with any calldata

ECON2-H007.title: Stuck Native ETH in SwapAndBridgeHandler
ECON2-H007.duplicate_group_description: SwapAndBridgeHandler.executeSwap/executeBridge are payable but do not forward msg.value to implementation contracts, permanently trapping native ETH

TECH-H018.title: LZHelperSender.updateTVL uses entire contract ETH balance as LayerZero fee, enabling accidental or adversarial ETH burn/drain via donations
TECH-H018.duplicate_group_description: LZHelperSender.updateTVL uses MessagingFee(address(this).balance, 0), spending the entire contract ETH balance as LayerZero fee, enabling economic griefing via ETH donations

TECH-H014.title: BalancerFlashLoan.makeFlashLoan is publicly callable, enabling griefing and potential vault-impacting external calls via keeper-only check bypass attempts
TECH-H014.duplicate_group_description: BalancerFlashLoan.makeFlashLoan is publicly callable without access control, enabling griefing via repeated reverting flash loan attempts

ECON-H015.title: Camelot LP TVL Manipulation via Spot Reserves
ECON-H015.duplicate_group_description: CamelotConnector._getPositionTVL uses spot getReserves() for LP valuation, vulnerable to flash loan pool manipulation

OPS-H014.title: Keepers multisig execution can be griefed by replaying signatures after intentional revert to consume signer bandwidth (nonce increments pre-call)
OPS-H014.duplicate_group_description: Keepers.execute can be griefed via insufficient gasLimit or induced reverts, consuming signing bandwidth and stalling strategy execution

OPS-H017.title: Omnichain bridge transaction approvals never expire, allowing delayed execution under changed conditions
OPS-H017.duplicate_group_description: OmnichainLogic.startBridgeTransaction has no upper bound expiry on approved bridge transactions, allowing stale approvals to be executed indefinitely

TECH-H004.title: UNIv3Connector TVL Overcounting via Aggregated Pool Position Instead of Per-NFT Position

TECH-H007.title: SiloConnector TVL Calculation Incorrect for Non-18-Decimal Tokens Due to Hardcoded 1e18 Normalization

TECH-H017.title: SwapAndBridgeHandler emergency disable is ineffective (onlyExistingRoute boolean logic allows disabled routes)

TECH-H019.title: OmnichainLogic bridge approvals never expire, enabling delayed execution under changed conditions
